name: Jinzo - Layered
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>造</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>間</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サイコ・レイヤー
desc:
2 Level 6 monsters
You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the End Phase, but it cannot activate its effects or declare an attack. If a Trap is on the field: You can Tribute 1 monster, and if you do, destroy 1 face-up card on the field. You can only use each effect of "Jinzo - Layered" once per turn.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
